results.name: panic_assertion_failed
results.rationale: Function builds core::fmt::Arguments on stack from rdi/rsi (&str pieces) and tail-calls panic_fmt with rdx forwarded as &'static Location.

results.name: panic_index_out_of_bounds
results.rationale: Standard Rust core::panicking::panic_bounds_check pattern: index+len formatted into Arguments, then panic_fmt called with rdx (Location) forwarded as the track_caller location.

results.name: core::result::unwrap_failed
results.rationale: Standard core::result::unwrap_failed: &str (rdi/rsi) + &dyn Debug (rdx/rcx) + implicit #[track_caller] &Location (r8); body builds Arguments and tail-calls panic_fmt - noreturn.

results.name: panic_overflow_sub
results.rationale: Builds an Arguments slice over the static str "attempt to subtract with overflow" and tail-calls core::panicking::panic_fmt; rdi is the implicit #[track_caller] &'static Location passed straight through (scalar, never derefed in this fn).

results.name: option_unit_qty_add_a
results.rationale: Two &OptionUnitQty (tag/unit/value, all 8B), returns merged (tag, unit) pair in (rax, rdx) per inlined comment "OptionUnitQty unit resolution for addition (variant A)".

results.name: compute_margin_requirement_by_mode
results.submitted_decl:
#[repr(C)]
pub struct MarginRequirementResult {
    pub kind: u64,
    pub price_lo: u64,
    pub price_hi: u64,
    pub notional_lo: u64,
    pub notional_hi: u64,
    pub size_lo: u64,
    pub size_hi: u64,
    pub mark_lo: u64,
    pub mark_hi: u64,
    pub margin_type: u64,
    pub margin_req: u64,
    pub margin_addl: u64,
    pub abs_notional_lo: u64,
    pub abs_notional_hi: u64,
    pub flags: u64,
}

#[repr(C)]
pub struct MarginSpec {
    pub margin_type: u64,
    pub margin_req: u64,
    pub margin_addl: u64,
}

#[repr(C)]
pub struct Position {
    pub asset_id: u64,
    pub side: u64,
    pub szi: i64,
    pub mid: [u8; 0x60],
    pub margin: MarginSpec,
    pub max_leverage_alt: u64,
    pub max_leverage: u8,
    pub tail: [u8; 0x8],
}

#[repr(C)]
pub struct OraclePx {
    pub px_lo: u64,
    pub px_hi: u64,
    pub timestamp: u64,
    pub mark: i64,
}

(this: &Position, oracle_px: &OraclePx) -> MarginRequirementResult
results.submitted_types:
#[repr(C)]
pub struct MarginRequirementResult {
    pub kind: u64,
    pub price_lo: u64,
    pub price_hi: u64,
    pub notional_lo: u64,
    pub notional_hi: u64,
    pub size_lo: u64,
    pub size_hi: u64,
    pub mark_lo: u64,
    pub mark_hi: u64,
    pub margin_type: u64,
    pub margin_req: u64,
    pub margin_addl: u64,
    pub abs_notional_lo: u64,
    pub abs_notional_hi: u64,
    pub flags: u64,
}

#[repr(C)]
pub struct MarginSpec {
    pub margin_type: u64,
    pub margin_req: u64,
    pub margin_addl: u64,
}

#[repr(C)]
pub struct Position {
    pub asset_id: u64,
    pub side: u64,
    pub szi: i64,
    pub mid: [u8; 0x60],
    pub margin: MarginSpec,
    pub max_leverage_alt: u64,
    pub max_leverage: u8,
    pub tail: [u8; 0x8],
}

#[repr(C)]
pub struct OraclePx {
    pub px_lo: u64,
    pub px_hi: u64,
    pub timestamp: u64,
    pub mark: i64,
}
results.rationale: sret returns 120-byte MarginRequirementResult; rsi is &Position with margin spec at +0x78 and max_leverage at +0x98; rdx is &OraclePx (24-byte struct with mark price at +0x18).

results.name: compute_user_margin_and_shortfall
results.rationale: rsi=&AccountState (Option<UnitQty> equity at +0, isolated_equity at +0x18, BTreeMap<u64,AssetPosition> at +0x30); rdx=&Vec<u64> oracle prices (cap at +8, len at +0x10); rdi sret returns 4 Option<UnitQty> margin quantities (96B).

results.name: compute_account_value_for_direction
results.submitted_signature: (user_state: &UserState<'_>, is_isolated: bool, asset_idx: u64, margin_mode: u8, oracle_data: &Vec<Px>) -> Quantity
results.rationale: sret 24-byte Quantity (sign,unit,value); rsi=&UserState with cross/isolated balance + Box-like inner; rdx=is_isolated bool (test dl,1); rcx=asset_idx u64; r8=margin_mode u8; r9=&Vec<Px>.
